hero.description: Stop losing track of the assets you bought months ago across dozens of emails and marketplace accounts. AssetVault catalogs everything you own on Unity Asset Store, Unreal Marketplace, ArtStation, Envato, and more — so you can focus on building, not searching.

features.title: Everything you need to stay organized
features.subtitle: Simple yet powerful tools to manage your growing digital asset collection.

catalog.title: Asset Catalog
catalog.description: Store and organize all your digital assets with notes and preview images.

multiPlatform.title: Multi-Platform
multiPlatform.description: Track purchases across Unity, Unreal, ArtStation, Envato, itch.io and many more.

smartTags.title: Smart Tags
smartTags.description: Organize with custom tags and default categories for instant filtering.

secure.title: Secure & Private
secure.description: Your data is private and secure. Only you can access your asset library.

useCase.title: Built for game developers & 3D artists
useCase.example: Imagine you're building a cyberpunk cyber cafe management sim called "Neon Nexus." Players repair old hardware and sell cybersecurity services. You've purchased Unity asset packs for hacking mini-games, low-poly computer hardware models from Sketchfab, synthwave sound loops from Gumroad, and neon UI textures from Envato.
useCase.problem: Without AssetVault, these purchases are scattered across four marketplace accounts and dozens of email receipts. With AssetVault, they're all tagged, searchable, and organized in one dashboard.

cta.title: Ready to get organized?
cta.description: Join developers and artists using AssetVault to manage their digital asset libraries. No credit card needed, no hidden fees — ever.

verification.title: 📧 Email Verification Required
verification.description: After creating your account, we'll send you a verification link. Please verify your email before using your account.

signup.success: Account created! Check your email to verify your email address.
